body:
REQUEST_CHANGES
**Config-to-loop wiring missing.** `NewConfig.ReviewMaxRetries` and `ResolveReviewMaxRetries()` exist (cli/internal/config/types.go), and `ExecuteBeadLoopOptions.ReviewMaxRetries` is honored (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go), but no caller in `cli/cmd/` reads the resolved value and sets it on the options struct. `grep -r ReviewMaxRetries cli/cmd` returns nothing. AC #4 explicitly requires "verifies the loop res…
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T084842-dd955bd9/reviewer-stream.log

post-merge review: REQUEST_CHANGES
**Config-to-loop wiring missing.** `NewConfig.ReviewMaxRetries` and `ResolveReviewMaxRetries()` exist (cli/internal/config/types.go), and `ExecuteBeadLoopOptions.ReviewMaxRetries` is honored (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go), but no caller in `cli/cmd/` reads the resolved value and sets it on the options struct. `grep -r ReviewMaxRetries cli/cmd` returns nothing. AC #4 explicitly requires "verifies the loop respects the override" sourced from `.ddx/config.yaml`; the existing config test stops at the loader. Add the plumbing in the `ddx work` / `ddx agent execute-loop` command wiring and either extend `TestReviewMaxRetriesConfig` to drive the loop via that path, or add an integration test that loads YAML→options→worker and asserts escalation at the configured threshold.
result_rev=79fc5c6b6bd733b7250992698e55330d03dfe86c
base_rev=048a82f041c562323c717a3d072d25ae1431ef07

APPROVE
Iter 1 fixes the wiring gap that triggered the prior REQUEST_CHANGES: `cfg.ResolveReviewMaxRetries()` is now passed into `ExecuteBeadLoopOptions` from `runAgentExecuteLoop`, completing YAML→options→worker plumbing. All four required tests are present and assert the documented event-body fields and retry-budget scoping.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T143440-73ecde86/reviewer-stream.log

success
